description.p: Potjie manages secure, encrypted, user-space virtual machines ("boxes"). Each box is a LUKS-encrypted disk that QEMU decrypts only while you are actively using it. When you are done, the box is re-locked automatically — your data is sealed and encrypted until you open it again.

ul.li: LUKS-encrypted QEMU virtual machines — no root required
User-space networking via slirp (no TAP devices or bridging)
Implicit lifecycle: the box runs only while the Shell tab is open
SSH port forwards (host ↔ box) configured live in the GUI
Generate desktop launchers that keep a box alive for one app
Desktop notifications on every box start and stop

description.p: Initial release. Full LUKS VM lifecycle, SSH port forwards, and an embedded terminal shell tab.
